chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ شَهْوَةِ النِّسَاءِ عَلَى شَهْوَةِ الرِّجَالِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 20 – The superiority of the desires of the women over the desires of the men

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/32)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/32)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ فُضِّلَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ بِتِسْعَةٍ وَ تِسْعِينَ مِنَ اللَّذَّةِ وَ لَكِنَّ اللَّهَ أَلْقَى عَلَيْهِنَّ الْحَيَاءَ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from one of his companions, from Marwak Bin Ubeyd, from Zur’at Bin Muhammad, from Sama’at Bin Mihran, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Women have an additional ninety nine part enjoyment above men, but Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Attached the shyness to be upon them’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from certain persons of his people from Marwak ibn ‘Ubayd from Zur’ah ibn Muhammad from Sanaa ‘ah ibn Mehran from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Women have an additional ninety-nine parts of enjoyment above men but Allah has placed shyness upon them.’”
